name: hoc/timeline
description: A chronological event-display HOC that renders a vertical list of timestamped milestones with customizable node icons, color accents, and content expansion. Supports left, right, and alternate layout modes, optional loading indicators, and pending-item placeholders. Composed of Timeline, TimelineItem, TimelineNode, and TimelineContent primitives with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Order-tracking pages showing Ordered, Processing, Shipped, and Delivered milestones
Project-management roadmaps displaying sprint cycles, release dates, and blocker events
User-account audit logs listing login history, password changes, and permission updates
Application changelogs or release-note pages with version tags and feature summaries
usage: import { Timeline, TimelineItem, TimelineNode, TimelineContent } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/timeline"
